text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, on the way home...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Lucky you! ♪ Rejoice, for I<n>grant you
the honor of socializing with<n>me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Whoa? Excuse you, I believe you<n>should be
saying "thank you for the<n>honor."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now, as for the reason I'm here...<n>Your trainee is
still around, is she not?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
In that case, which would you prefer?<n>Partner
running with me or practicing<n>King
Commendation? I shall allow you<n>to choose.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's where you commend me for<n>my brilliant
wonderfulness. You are to<n>continually praise me
for being such a<n>first-rate individual.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Getting roped into something as<n>mindless as that
will probably deal<n>quite a blow to our mental
well-being...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Partner running would definitely<n>benefit
<chrname>, but I'm worried she<n>doesn't have the
stamina to run right<n>now.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! Not a bad choice at all!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, we end up partner running<n>with King
Halo.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Very well. Hehe, here we go! What's<n>my name?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's "King"! You're supposed to yell<n>my name!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hey! No back talk allowed! Put your<n>heart into it!
